zh.lifeSummary: Mary Nesse於大約1380年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾盧德洛福。她於1397年1月31日與Samuel Short在英國英格蘭史洛普爾盧德洛福結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1430年在她的家鄉享年51歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭史洛普爾盧德洛福。

nameMeanings.name: Nesse
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: from a pet form of the female medieval personal name Nes, a short form of Agnes .

variants.name: Agnes
meanings: English; French (Agnès); Hungarian (Ágnes): from a female personal name, which is from Late Latin Agnes and this one from Greek Hagnē, from hagnē ‘pure, chaste’. Saint Agnes was a Christian virgin martyr, one of those who suffered under the persecutions of Diocletian in 303 AD . Her name was associated by folk etymology with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, and in medieval art she is often depicted with a lamb (the lamb of God). See also English Annis .

American shortened (and altered) form of rare Greek metronymics Agnidis or Agniadis, both derived from the female personal name Hagnē (see 1 above), or of patronymics like Anagnostopoulos (compare Agnew 4).

nameMeanings.name: Mary
meanings: Hebrew: Bitter; Marion is the French form.

variants.name: Marion
meanings: Originally a medieval French diminutive form of Marie , introduced to Britain in the Middle Ages. In some places it was taken as a pet form of Margaret or Margery . As a male name, it is an altered form of the Continental male name Marian, a derivative of Latin Marianus (from Marius ), but is now rarely, if ever, used. It was the birth name of the American film star John Wayne ( 1907–79 ).

variants.name: Marcia
meanings: Often used as a feminine equivalent of Mark , but in fact a feminine form of Marcius, itself a derivative of Marcus . One St Marcia is commemorated in a group with Felix, Luciolus, Fortunatus, and others; another with Zenais, Cyria, and Valeria; and a third with Ariston, Crescentian, Eutychian, Urban, Vitalis, Justus, Felicissimus, Felix, and Symphorosa. None is individually very famous.

en.lifeSummary: Mary Nesse was born about 1380, in Ludlow, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. She married Samuel Short on 31 January 1397, in Ludlow, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1430, in her hometown, at the age of 51, and was buried in Ludlow, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Nesseは約1380年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアルドロウで生まれた。1397年1月31日にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアルドロウでSamuel Shortと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1430年に故郷で51歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアルドロウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Nesse(은)는 대략 1380년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 루들로에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1397년 1월 31일 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 루들로에서 Samuel Short(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1430년 그녀의 고향에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 루들로에 묻혔다.
